# [[Defaults]]
set(CJSON_STATIC TRUE)


# [[Binaries]]
if(CJSON_STATIC)
    eightgine_add_module(MODULE_NAME "cJSON"
        MODULE_TYPE STATIC
        MODULE_DEFINITIONS PRIVATE "CJSON_HIDE_SYMBOLS"
    )
else()
    eightgine_add_module(MODULE_NAME "cJSON"
        MODULE_TYPE SHARED
        MODULE_DEFINITIONS PRIVATE "CJSON_EXPORT_SYMBOLS" INTERFACE "CJSON_IMPORT_SYMBOLS"
     )
endif()

eightgine_configure_module_or_executable(MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_NAME "cJSON"
    MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_SOURCES_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src"
    MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_INCLUDE_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/include" "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/include/cJSON"
)
